name: octane-tsrx-portal-swarm-bench
description: portal-swarm bench fixture for octane authored in .tsrx - 200 items each conditionally portalling a tooltip via the compiled child-position portal() fast path (section A) and value-position createPortal descriptors from a plain-.ts helper (sections B / B_stable). Exposes window.__mount/__openAll/__rerenderA/... for the Playwright harness.
